title: Cannot select or copy text from Elicitation dialog output
body:
Type: Bug Since a few versions, the output of the elicitation dialog stopped being interactive, meaning when i render a Markdown content, especially when it is longer and there is a scroll, i cannot copy anything from the dialog. Extension version: 0.43.2026040601 VS Code version: Code - Insiders 1.115.0-insider (6c8fcf1806fc53b1a1fb8863973ac55842edeb05, 2026-04-06T02:44:23Z) OS version: Windows_NT x64 10.0.26100 Modes:

comments:
I was able to reproduce this issue on Windows 11 with VS Code Insiders.

It seems like text selection might be getting blocked in the scrollable Markdown container. Possibly related to CSS (`user-select`) or overlay behavior.

Happy to help test potential fixes if needed.
